chapter_1.title: Chapter I Complete - Ashen Echo
chapter_1.body: The campfire reflects on broken wings. You can preserve your light, or bargain with darkness to survive deeper floors.

chapter_2.title: Chapter II Complete - Furnace of Faith
chapter_2.body: Steel and prayer clash in your chest. A righteous path grants grace; a darker path grants ruthless power.

chapter_3.title: Chapter III Complete - Frozen Covenant
chapter_3.body: Silence follows your steps before the final gate. One last vow will shape your ending.

chapter_1.title: Chapter I - Forsaken Catacombs
chapter_1.subtitle: Survive and establish momentum
chapter_1.hazard_hint: Water flow and spore clouds drain position and stamina.

chapter_2.title: Chapter II - Ember Foundry
chapter_2.subtitle: Pressure increases with heat
chapter_2.hazard_hint: Lava pools punish greed. Conveyor lanes can push you into danger.

chapter_3.title: Chapter III - Frost Cathedral
chapter_3.subtitle: Control pace and spacing
chapter_3.hazard_hint: Ice reduces control. Frostbite buildup can trigger heavy periodic damage.

chapter_4.title: Chapter IV - Void Bastion
chapter_4.subtitle: Final approach
chapter_4.hazard_hint: Void corruption ramps damage over time. Keep gauges low between fights.

balance.title: Dusk Path
balance.summary: You walk between grace and ruin, preserving both endings until the final threshold decides which will answer.
balance.camp_focus: Use camp pauses to steady both gauges and keep route choices flexible.
balance.fragment_hint: Balanced runs reveal fragments tied to thresholds, choirs and forgotten oaths.

redeem.title: Road of Grace
redeem.summary: Mercy and restraint sharpen your march, turning each chapter into a vow to hold the line for those behind you.
redeem.camp_focus: Spend camp windows on sustain, purification and route safety to preserve the redeem ending axis.
redeem.fragment_hint: Redeem-heavy runs favor shrine, survivor and benediction fragments.

fall.title: Crown of Ruin
fall.summary: Power answers quickly when you choose appetite over mercy, but every shortcut tightens the abyss around the camp.
fall.camp_focus: Use camp pauses to convert pressure into offense before corruption overwhelms the route.
fall.fragment_hint: Fallen routes expose arena, threshold and throne-side fragments sooner.

balance.title: Ashen Embers
balance.body: The first camp still smells of rain and ash. You have not chosen who to become, and the silence keeps asking.
balance.fragment_hint: Search the shrine and survivor events to recover the camp's first missing memories.

redeem.title: Held Oath
redeem.body: The camp sees your restraint and answers with steadier hands; every ration shared here strengthens the vows ahead.
redeem.fragment_hint: Grace-aligned choices in chapter_1 reveal the earliest chapel fragments.

fall.title: Ashen Appetite
fall.body: Your answers come faster when they cost someone else. The camp grows quiet, but your power grows louder.
fall.fragment_hint: Void-leaning choices in chapter_1 uncover relic and afterglow fragments tied to the fall route.

balance.title: Forge Interlude
balance.body: The forge room offers a pause to weigh steel against hunger. Neither can carry the whole war alone.
balance.fragment_hint: Chapter_2 event rooms carry forge and arena memories that shape both middle endings.

redeem.title: Tempered Faith
redeem.body: At the furnace halt, each tempered edge feels like a promise not to let strength outrun purpose.
redeem.fragment_hint: Choose tempered routes and defensive chapter effects to preserve redeem momentum into the cathedral.

fall.title: Greedy Slag
fall.body: The foundry teaches you how easily survival becomes appetite when every spark can be sold for one more blade.
fall.fragment_hint: Arena and salvage choices in chapter_2 accelerate fall-aligned fragment discovery.

balance.title: Aurora Vigil
balance.body: The cathedral frost preserves every doubt. At this camp, balance means carrying both halo and abyss without surrendering to either.
balance.fragment_hint: Chapter_3 whispers and reliquary fragments reveal the road of dusk more clearly than any prayer.

redeem.title: Frozen Benediction
redeem.body: The aurora camp feels almost holy; every careful choice here keeps the choir within reach of forgiveness.
redeem.fragment_hint: Redeem momentum in chapter_3 favors cathedral and guardian-style memory fragments.

fall.title: Whispered Ruin
fall.body: The frost no longer quiets your hunger. Even the choir begins to sound like a door worth breaking.
fall.fragment_hint: Void pressure and whisper bargains in chapter_3 point toward the fall ending.

balance.title: Last Ember
balance.body: No route remains untouched in the final camp. Balance now means choosing what survives the throne, not what stays pure.
balance.fragment_hint: Threshold and route fragments decide which ending still listens when the void opens.

redeem.title: Grace Before Dawn
redeem.body: This final ember is small, but it is enough. The camp waits on your last answer, not your loudest weapon.
redeem.fragment_hint: Benediction and threshold choices set the redeem ending arc before the final boss.

fall.title: Crown Before Collapse
fall.body: The last camp is no refuge now, only a staging ground. The throne ahead already knows your name.
fall.fragment_hint: The final threshold and ruin-side choices complete the fall route memory chain.

chapter_1.title: Ruined Shrine
chapter_1.body: An ancient shrine still flickers with weak light. You may pray for grace or take the relic by force.

chapter_effect.title: Sanctified Ward
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: hazard pressure down, armor and damage up.

chapter_effect.title: Abyss Hunger
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: stronger offense but heavier hazards.

chapter_1.title: Lost Survivor
chapter_1.body: A wounded survivor begs for help. Your supplies are limited.

chapter_effect.title: Cold Detour
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: faster spawn pressure, extra gains.

chapter_1.title: Afterglow Reflection
chapter_1.body: The shrine mirrors an ending you once reached. The memory changes your next steps.

chapter_effect.title: Afterglow Grace
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: stable pacing and stronger defense.

chapter_2.title: Overheated Forge
chapter_2.body: A demon forge still burns. You can temper your weapon or salvage valuables.

chapter_effect.title: Tempered Edge
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: lower hazard pressure and better control.

chapter_effect.title: Greedy Slag
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: more pressure in exchange for burst damage.

chapter_2.title: Ash Arena
chapter_2.body: A cursed arena offers reward for blood. Entering stirs the abyss.

chapter_effect.title: Arena Frenzy
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: rapid spawns and stronger weapon output.

chapter_effect.title: Calm Breath
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: lower incoming pressure and safer hazards.

chapter_3.title: Whispers in Ice
chapter_3.body: Frozen whispers reveal fragments of your origin. Listening too long may scar your soul.

chapter_effect.title: Frozen Focus
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: stable movement and reduced hazard burden.

chapter_effect.title: Whisper Mania
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: high damage with severe corruption pressure.

chapter_4.title: Threshold of Dawn
chapter_4.body: At the final threshold, a silent choir offers one last boon before the abyssal throne.

chapter_effect.title: Last Benediction
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: lower threat and steady holy momentum.

chapter_effect.title: Last Ruin
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: extreme power with punishing pressure.

memory_ch1_boss.title: Fragment I: Chapel Ash
memory_ch1_boss.text: In ruined sanctuaries, your wings once shielded thousands.

memory_ch2_boss.title: Fragment II: Furnace Oath
memory_ch2_boss.text: You forged holy steel, then watched it melt in betrayal.

memory_ch3_boss.title: Fragment III: Frozen Prayer
memory_ch3_boss.text: Your final prayer froze midair when the heavens turned away.

memory_ch4_boss.title: Fragment IV: Broken Crown
memory_ch4_boss.text: At the edge of oblivion, you learned that mercy and ruin share one throne.

memory_ch1_route_vanguard.title: Fragment V: Vanguard Oath
memory_ch1_route_vanguard.text: You chose the shield wall first, teaching survivors to endure before they could strike.

memory_ch1_route_raider.title: Fragment VI: Raider Ember
memory_ch1_route_raider.text: You marched ahead of the line, seizing relic fuel before despair could claim the camp.

memory_ch2_route_vanguard.title: Fragment VII: Forge Vigil
memory_ch2_route_vanguard.text: At the furnace gates, your watch never broke; every blade was tempered under your vow.

memory_ch2_route_raider.title: Fragment VIII: Ash Requisition
memory_ch2_route_raider.text: You stripped the foundry bare in one night and armed the weak with stolen fire.

memory_ch3_route_vanguard.title: Fragment IX: Cathedral Bulwark
memory_ch3_route_vanguard.text: In frozen halls, your stance held the corridor while the last pilgrims escaped.

memory_ch3_route_raider.title: Fragment X: Whisper Bargain
memory_ch3_route_raider.text: You listened to the ice and took its price, trading warmth for power that never sleeps.

memory_ch4_route_vanguard.title: Fragment XI: Dusk Bastion
memory_ch4_route_vanguard.text: At the final breach you held the broken gate, buying one last dawn for the camp behind you.

memory_ch4_route_raider.title: Fragment XII: Crown of Ash
memory_ch4_route_raider.text: You struck first at the abyssal throne and left with spoils that burned even in silence.

memory_ch2_event_forge.title: Fragment XIII: Furnace Ledger
memory_ch2_event_forge.text: Every ingot had a name; every blade you raised was a promise you refused to forget.

memory_ch3_event_sanctum.title: Fragment XIV: Silent Choir
memory_ch3_event_sanctum.text: The frozen sanctum sang without voices, and you learned to read its hymns in fractured light.

memory_ch4_event_void.title: Fragment XV: Empty Coronation
memory_ch4_event_void.text: When the void offered a crown, you answered with steel and wrote your oath into the dark.

memory_meta_campfire.title: Fragment XVI: Campfire Testament
memory_meta_campfire.text: Between runs, embers carried your old vows; each return sharpened the path you chose to keep.

memory_ch4_route_vanguard_ii.title: Fragment XVII: Last Bulwark
memory_ch4_route_vanguard_ii.text: When the abyss breached the final ward, you planted your banner and held until dawn split the smoke.

memory_ch4_route_raider_ii.title: Fragment XVIII: Spoils of Dusk
memory_ch4_route_raider_ii.text: You returned from the shattered throne with cursed relics and a silence no priest could cleanse.

memory_ch2_event_forge_ii.title: Fragment XIX: Tempered Debt
memory_ch2_event_forge_ii.text: Each strike at the anvil paid an old debt; each spark was a vow to those you failed to protect.

memory_ch3_event_sanctum_ii.title: Fragment XX: Frostbound Psalm
memory_ch3_event_sanctum_ii.text: In the frozen nave, hymns traced your blade and taught you where mercy ends and duty begins.

memory_ch4_event_void_ii.title: Fragment XXI: Throne Without Name
memory_ch4_event_void_ii.text: The void called you by your oldest name, and you answered with steel before the echo could root.

memory_meta_reliquary.title: Fragment XXII: Reliquary Oath
memory_meta_reliquary.text: Back at camp, the reliquary glowed with stolen starlight, reminding you that every run rewrites your covenant.

memory_ch1_event_shrine.title: Fragment XXIII: Shrine Dust
memory_ch1_event_shrine.text: The ruined shrine kept a trace of incense in its stones, and for one heartbeat you remembered the choir that once answered your prayer.

memory_ch1_event_survivor.title: Fragment XXIV: Borrowed Rations
memory_ch1_event_survivor.text: You learned that a single loaf shared in darkness can bind a camp more tightly than any decree shouted in daylight.

memory_ch1_afterglow.title: Fragment XXV: Afterglow Debt
memory_ch1_afterglow.text: The old light did not absolve you; it only showed how many promises were still unpaid beneath the ash.

memory_ch2_event_arena.title: Fragment XXVI: Arena Brand
memory_ch2_event_arena.text: Every circle of scorched iron bore witness to the bargains heroes made when victory started to feel like appetite.

memory_ch3_event_whispers.title: Fragment XXVII: Icebound Names
memory_ch3_event_whispers.text: In the cathedral frost, names of the fallen drifted like breath, and each one struck with more weight than steel.

memory_ch4_event_threshold.title: Fragment XXVIII: Last Threshold
memory_ch4_event_threshold.text: Before the final gate, grace and ruin stood so close that only the steadiness of your steps kept them apart.

memory_route_redeem.title: Fragment XXIX: Road of Grace
memory_route_redeem.text: Redemption was never a single choice, but a road paved by refusing power each time it begged to be easy.

memory_route_fall.title: Fragment XXX: Road of Ruin
memory_route_fall.text: Every cruel shortcut carved a straighter line to the throne, until the throne itself began to look like mercy.

memory_route_balance.title: Fragment XXXI: Road of Dusk
memory_route_balance.text: To walk between hymn and curse meant carrying both, and letting neither decide who would rise from the dust.

memory_camp_blacksmith.title: Fragment XXXII: Hammer Between Worlds
memory_camp_blacksmith.text: At the camp forge, each repaired edge reminded you that survival is built as much in the quiet between battles as in the strike itself.

memory_camp_oracle.title: Fragment XXXIII: Quiet Beneath Embers
memory_camp_oracle.text: When the altar dimmed and the camp fell silent, the memories that remained were the ones no ending could take from you.

memory_fs1_balance.title: Fragment XXXIV: Rift Between Bells
memory_fs1_balance.text: Inside the broken hours of the rift, dusk taught you that memory survives by learning how to loop without surrendering to either hymn or ruin.

memory_fs1_redeem.title: Fragment XXXV: Choir Beneath the Rift
memory_fs1_redeem.text: The choir answered from below the ward, proving that vows kept in the upper halls can still echo through the fractures under time itself.

memory_fs1_fall.title: Fragment XXXVI: Reliquary of Broken Hours
memory_fs1_fall.text: Every shattered minute in the rift stacked like a relic, and each one remembered the bargains that first taught you to wear ruin without flinching.

memory_fs2_balance.title: Fragment XXXVII: Forge of Dusk
memory_fs2_balance.text: In the genesis chain, balance was not restraint but craft: a way to temper grace and ruin until neither could break the other outright.

memory_fs2_redeem.title: Fragment XXXVIII: Hearth of First Flame
memory_fs2_redeem.text: The forge remembered a first fire older than the camp, and in its glow every rescued vow returned as metal that refused to bend toward despair.

memory_fs2_fall.title: Fragment XXXIX: Anvil of Ruin
memory_fs2_fall.text: At the last anvil, ruin ceased to feel like a curse and became a method: hammer, spark, and hunger shaping the same relentless edge.

nar_ending_redeem.title: Grace Restored
nar_ending_redeem.summary: Your vows hold through the final gate, turning the whole run into proof that restraint can still outlast the abyss.
nar_ending_redeem.legacy: The camp survives because you chose to carry everyone through the last threshold, not just yourself.
nar_ending_redeem.fragment_hook: Redeem endings complete the choir-side fragment chain and strengthen shrine/survivor memory routes.

nar_ending_fall.title: Ruin Enthroned
nar_ending_fall.summary: The run resolves as conquest: every shortcut, bargain, and appetite now crowns the fall ending with deliberate force.
nar_ending_fall.legacy: The camp remembers your victories with fear, and the abyss answers your name before any prayer can rise.
nar_ending_fall.fragment_hook: Fall endings complete arena, threshold, and throne-side fragments that only ruthless routes can expose.

nar_ending_balance.title: Dusk Kept Intact
nar_ending_balance.summary: Neither halo nor abyss claims the final word; the run lands in the narrow space where both are forced to coexist.
nar_ending_balance.legacy: The borderlands endure because you kept every chapter from collapsing fully into grace or ruin.
nar_ending_balance.fragment_hook: Balance endings bind the threshold, reliquary, and route-memory fragments into a complete dusk archive.

nar_ending_redeem: At first light the choir returns to the camp in broken harmony, answering the vows you carried through the final gate.
The survivors rebuild the first ward with your fragments laid into the stone, turning memory into shelter.
When the embers dim, the reliquary still glows - proof that grace survived the run because someone chose to keep it costly.
nar_ending_fall: The ash wind bends before you, and the camp learns that safety can arrive wearing the same face as dread.
Relics once buried under chapel stone now answer faster than prayers, each one sharpened by the bargains you accepted.
At the final watch, the throne no longer feels distant; it waits in every silence the camp can no longer fill.
nar_ending_balance: Twilight settles over the camp without surrendering to either hymn or curse, and the borderlands breathe for one more cycle.
The fragments you gathered no longer argue over who was right; together they map the price of surviving both paths.
When the altar fades, dusk remains - not as compromise, but as a route only this run could have defended.

first_unlock.title: Choir Restored
first_unlock.body: Your first redeem ending restores the choir's answer in full, proving the camp can survive without surrendering to the void.

repeat_unlock.title: Grace Remembered
repeat_unlock.body: Each return along the redeem route reveals new names, hymns, and vows inside the same dawn.

nar_ending_redeem.archive_hook: The altar now archives choir-side threads that point toward a sealed path beneath the first ward.

first_unlock.title: Throne Claimed
first_unlock.body: Your first fall ending teaches the camp that ruin can protect just as surely as it can consume.

repeat_unlock.title: Ruin Rehearsed
repeat_unlock.body: Repeated fall endings reveal how the throne keeps changing shape each time the abyss answers you.

nar_ending_fall.archive_hook: Fragments tied to the final threshold now whisper about a lower vault that only broken vows can open.

first_unlock.title: Dusk Archive Opened
first_unlock.body: Your first balance ending reveals that the borderlands were always an archive, not a compromise.

repeat_unlock.title: Twilight Refrain
repeat_unlock.body: Each balance repeat clarifies another route between grace and ruin, widening the archive without breaking it.

nar_ending_balance.archive_hook: The reliquary begins to chart hidden crossings that hint at a second sealed stratum below the altar.

balance.title: Dusk Archive
balance.summary: Balanced triggers now read like a stitched archive, linking shrines, reliquaries, and thresholds into one route memory.
balance.pace_hint: Keep rotating camp, event, and transition fragments to preserve the dusk cadence.

redeem.title: Grace Ledger
redeem.summary: Redeem triggers resolve as a ledger of rescued vows, revealing how camp choices soften later endings.
redeem.pace_hint: Chapter transitions and camp reflections are the fastest way to complete the choir-side fragment chain.

fall.title: Ruin Chronicle
fall.summary: Fall triggers collect as a ruthless chronicle, where arena, threshold, and throne fragments tighten into one descent.
fall.pace_hint: Void-leaning event resolutions and late camp echoes accelerate the ruin-side fragment tempo.

balance.title: Twilight Archive Gate
balance.teaser: The altar records crossings that do not exist on the main route map.
balance.unlock_hint: Sustain the dusk route and complete the archive recap chain to expose the second hidden stratum.

redeem.title: Choir Undercrypt
redeem.teaser: Beneath the restored ward, a sealed choir path answers only to vows kept at the final gate.
redeem.unlock_hint: Finish redeem-side fragments and preserve the grace route through the last camp to uncover FS1.

fall.title: Abyssal Reliquary
fall.teaser: The throne's echo now points below the chapel floor, where failed oaths are stacked like relics.
fall.unlock_hint: Complete ruin-side fragment chains and carry a fall ending into the archive to uncover FS1.

balance.title: Time Rift: Dusk Loop
balance.body: The rift archives a path where dusk survives by learning every possible ending without kneeling to any one of them.
balance.archive_echo: Each loop keeps a different bell note, and together they chart a route only the borderlands can hold.

redeem.title: Time Rift: Choir Refrain
redeem.body: Grace survives the fracture by returning as rhythm: a choir hidden below the ward, answering every vow you carried into the broken hours.
redeem.archive_echo: The undercrypt remembers which promises held when time itself started to split.

fall.title: Time Rift: Broken Hours
fall.body: In the reliquary below the chapel floor, ruin keeps perfect time, preserving every bargain that once made victory feel easier than mercy.
fall.archive_echo: The rift does not condemn the fall; it catalogs how often power first arrived disguised as necessity.

balance.title: Genesis Forge: Dusk Temper
balance.body: The forge proves that balance can be built, not merely endured, when grace and ruin are tempered into one deliberate edge.
balance.archive_echo: Every trial leaves a seam between opposites, and the archive records how those seams keep the world from splitting apart.

redeem.title: Genesis Forge: First Flame
redeem.body: At the sealed hearth, the first flame answers the redeemed path by teaching the forge to remember salvation as labor instead of miracle.
redeem.archive_echo: What the camp once called grace now returns as a craft the survivors can hold in their own hands.

fall.title: Genesis Forge: Ruin Temper
fall.body: The genesis chain reveals how ruin can harden into method, turning appetite, relic, and fire into a doctrine the forge refuses to forget.
fall.archive_echo: Each strike on the anvil records a victory bought too quickly, then asks whether that speed was the point all along.

nar_ending_redeem.title: Ending: REDEEM
nar_ending_redeem.story: You rise with broken wings healed by grace. The abyss closes, but your oath remains.
nar_ending_redeem.epilogue_first_unlock: At dawn, the camp bells ring again. Survivors whisper your true name and the first altar rekindles.
nar_ending_redeem.epilogue_repeat: The redeemed path returns in clearer detail; each cycle reveals another vow you once forgot.

nar_ending_fall.title: Ending: FALL
nar_ending_fall.story: You wear the void as a crown. Salvation is denied, and power becomes your final prayer.
nar_ending_fall.epilogue_first_unlock: Ash storms kneel at your steps. The old sanctums seal their gates as your shadow claims the horizon.
nar_ending_fall.epilogue_repeat: The fall deepens with each return; the abyss no longer tempts you, it answers you.

nar_ending_balance.title: Ending: BALANCE
nar_ending_balance.story: Neither halo nor abyss claims you. You walk the narrow dusk, guarding both worlds.
nar_ending_balance.epilogue_first_unlock: In twilight archives, both hymns and curses answer your command. The borderlands breathe in peace.
nar_ending_balance.epilogue_repeat: Balance becomes sharper with every cycle; you begin to see hidden routes between mercy and ruin.
